_shorthelp: Flexboxes can contain text, HTML or other controls and are easily laid out.

_content.desc: Content of the control. Design time. At runtime, use .innerHTML.

_htmltemplate: "<{HTMLTag} id='{id}' class='{class}' {attributes!j} style='{_flexboxcss!i}{_margincss!i}{_paddingcss!i}{_fontcss!i}{_colorscss!i}{_bordercss!i}{hidden}{style!j}'{if content<>'' and '<' not in content} data-i18n='{content!j}'{/if}>",{_childhtml},'{content!j}',"</{HTMLTag}>",
